title: Separate space for Item/Subitem Updates and Automation Updates
excerpt: Being able to see the audit trail for Items and Subitems is important. However, the updates populate in the same space as Comments made by the users. This creates a lot of ‘noise’ that clutters up the Updates space and i…

posts.author: Lyndsay_Q (Lyndsay Quilter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Being able to see the audit trail for Items and Subitems is important. However, the updates populate in the same space as Comments made by the users. This creates a lot of ‘noise’ that clutters up the Updates space and increases the risk of user comments being missed.
Is it possible to create a separate space for comments and communications between users, and another where the column and automation updates can be housed?
